welcome.title: Ethnocare Online Tool
welcome.description: Select the tool you want to use
welcome.description1: The sizing tool aims to guide you in finding the right size of Ethnocare product.
welcome.description2: The assistance tool provides help and support for using Ethnocare products.
welcome.description3: The return tool allows you to manage returns and exchanges of Ethnocare products.
welcome.description4: The FAQ tool provides answers to frequently asked questions about Ethnocare products.
welcome.description5: The recommendation tool helps you find the best Ethnocare products based on your needs.

welcomeRecommendation.title: Solution Finder
welcomeRecommendation.description: Answer the following questions to get a personalized product recommendation.

welcomeReturn.title: Return Tool
welcomeReturn.description: Use this tool to return a product.

identificationReturn.title: Identification
identificationReturn.description: Are you a user/clinic or a distributor?

assistanceToolReturn.title: Assistance Tool
assistanceToolReturn.descriptionClinic: Did you try the troubleshooting steps provided in the assistance tool?
assistanceToolReturn.descriptionDistributor: Did the returnee try the troubleshooting steps provided in the assistance tool?

welcomeAssistance.title: Assistance Tool
welcomeAssistance.description: Use this tool to get help and support for using Ethnocare products.

productAssistance.title: Product
productAssistance.description: Which product do you need assistance with?

welcomeSizing.title: Sizing Tool
welcomeSizing.description: Use this tool to find the right size of Ethnocare product for you.

unitsSizing.title: Units
unitsSizing.description: Select your preferred units of measurement.

productSizing.title: Product
productSizing.description: Select the product you want to find a size for.

circumferenceTTSizing.title: Circumference
circumferenceTTSizing.description_metric: Measure the circumference (C) at 4 cm from the distal end.
circumferenceTTSizing.description_imperial: Measure the circumference (C) at 1.5 in from the distal end.

circumferenceTTVacSizing.title: Circumference
circumferenceTTVacSizing.description: Measure the circumference (C) at the top of the seal

lengthTTSizing.title: Length
lengthTTSizing.description: Measure the length (L) from the top of the seal to the popliteal trim line

lengthTTVacSizing.title: Length
lengthTTVacSizing.description: Measure the length (L) from the top of the seal to the popliteal trim line
